raw_prompt:
The Boss asks: "Compute WACC for our new project. Cost of equity is 10%, weight of equity is 60%, weight of debt is 40%."
Cost of debt is not provided.
raw_response:
METHOD: Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC)
INPUTS:
  Re  = 10%    [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  We  = 60%    [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  Wd  = 40%    [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  Rd  = DATA UNAVAILABLE  [source: not provided - cost of debt]
  Tc  = DATA UNAVAILABLE  [source: not provided - tax rate]
FORMULA: WACC = We*Re + Wd*Rd*(1 - Tc)
SUBSTITUTION: blocked - Rd and Tc DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Partial equity term: 0.60 * 0.10 = 0.06
RESULT: DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Cannot complete WACC without Rd (and Tc). Ask Boss for cost of debt and tax rate.
evidence_quotes: Computation block with Cost of Debt marked DATA UNAVAILABLE
